full_script: import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv('data.csv'); I = df['item_id'].unique(); T = df['time_period'].unique(); c = df.groupby('item_id')['cost'].sum().to_dict(); d = df.groupby('time_period')['demand'].sum().to_dict()
mapping_explanation: Mathematical symbols are mapped to Python data structures as follows: c_i -> c, d_t -> d
Indices are consistent between sets and parameters
preprocessing_steps: Get mathematical model payload from generated outputs and reference model
Preview CSV to understand the structure and content of the dataset
